subcodes.first_line: These are the days of the Divine Manifestation; Mount Sinai is transported with joy and ecstasy, and all things cry out, morn and eventide, "He is come!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایام ایام ظهور و طور در وجد و سرور و الاشیاء تنادی فی الصباح و المساء قد اتی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power of prayer, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution
